rail-icon: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--list); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer;
rail-divider: width: 32px; height: 2px; background: var(--divider); border-radius: 1px; margin: 2px 0;
chan-nav: height: 48px; background: var(--chat); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--divider); padding: 44px 12px 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
chan-name: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); flex: 1; letter-spacing: -0.1px;
avatar: width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #657786, #26303A); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;
msg-head: display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 2px;
msg-bot-tag: background: var(--blurple); color: #fff; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 5px 1px; border-radius: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
msg-text: font-size: 14px; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.4; word-break: break-word;
mention: background: rgba(88,101,242,0.22); color: #C9CDFB; padding: 0 2px; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: 500;
reactions: display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-top: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap;
rxn: background: var(--list); border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 8px; padding: 2px 7px 2px 5px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-weight: 500;
compose-bar: background: var(--surface-2); border-radius: 22px; padding: 8px 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
c-plus: width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--text-secondary); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--chat); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; flex-shrink: 0;
